hero.description: Handpicked coffee, honest food, and a place where time slows down — right in the heart of Braunschweig.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.demo_notice: Concept Demo: Prices and availability are subject to confirmation by Café Zeitlos.

about.title: About Café Zeitlos
about.text: Café Zeitlos is a place to arrive, enjoy, and linger. Located at Rebenring in Braunschweig, rich breakfast ideas, savory sandwiches, bowls, burgers, and sweet highlights meet a warm, modern atmosphere.
about.image_alt: Atmospheric modern café interior with guests, coffee and breakfast

reservation.title: Reservation Request
reservation.name: Your Name
reservation.disclaimer: This is not a confirmed reservation. Please contact the cafe directly to confirm.
reservation.disclaimer_generate: This is not a confirmed reservation. Please copy your request details and contact the cafe via Instagram or phone to confirm your table.
reservation.error_past_date: The date cannot be in the past.
reservation.error_invalid_time: The time must be within opening hours (09:00 AM - 08:00 PM).

faq.title: Frequent Questions
faq.a1: We are located at Rebenring 47a in 38106 Braunschweig.
faq.a2: We are open daily from Monday to Sunday between 09:00 AM and 08:00 PM.
faq.a3: Café Zeitlos states that the meat used is 100% halal. For questions regarding individual ingredients or allergens, please ask the team directly.
faq.q4: How can I reserve a table?
faq.a4: Use our planner on the website to draft your request, then call us or message us on Instagram.
faq.q5: Can I order food for delivery?
faq.a5: Yes, we are available on Wolt. (Check current delivery areas directly on the platform).
faq.q6: Where can I find the latest news?
faq.a6: Follow us on Instagram at @cafezeitlos_bs for all updates.
